name: Roadmunk Product Roadmap API
what_it_does: Roadmunk product roadmap REST API for product managers to create, manage, and share visual product roadmaps with timeline views, swimlane layouts, stakeholder sharing, and bidirectional Jira integration for roadmap-to-delivery alignment. Enables AI agents to manage roadmap item creation and timeline scheduling for roadmap planning automation, handle milestone and release configuration for product delivery automation, access roadmap view and layout management for stakeholder communication automation, retrieve Jira bidirectional sync for engineering alignment automation, manage stakeholder sharing and access link for external visibility automation, handle custom field and tagging for roadmap organization automation, access roadmap snapshot and version management for roadmap history automation, retrieve team and workspace management for product portfolio automation, manage filter and view configuration for audience-specific roadmap automation, and integrate Roadmunk with Jira, GitHub, Trello, and development tools for end-to-end product roadmap workflow.
use_calls: Managing product roadmaps from visual planning automation agents
Syncing Jira issues to roadmap from alignment automation agents
Sharing roadmaps with stakeholders from communication agents
Tracking release milestones from delivery coordination agents
use_cases: Managing product roadmaps from visual planning automation agents
Syncing Jira issues to roadmap from alignment automation agents
Sharing roadmaps with stakeholders from communication agents
Tracking release milestones from delivery coordination agents
not_for: Full product management suite (use Aha! or Productboard for comprehensive PM)
Engineering task tracking (use Jira or Linear for developer task management)
Customer feedback collection (use Canny or UserVoice for feedback portals)
best_when: A product manager wanting AI agents to automate roadmap item management, Jira bidirectional sync, stakeholder presentation views, and roadmap snapshot sharing through Roadmunk's visual product roadmap tool (now part of Tempo).
avoid_when: TEMPO ACQUISITION INTEGRATION CHANGES: Roadmunk was acquired by Tempo Software in 2021 and is being integrated with Tempo's Jira ecosystem; automated integrations should monitor for product consolidation announcements; automated Roadmunk API workflows may migrate to Tempo Roadmaps API. API ACCESS REQUIRES BUSINESS PLAN: Roadmunk API access requires Business plan or higher; free and lower plans have no API access; automated roadmap management requires Business plan verification before integration. JIRA SYNC BIDIRECTIONAL CONFLICT RESOLUTION: Roadmunk-Jira bidirectional sync creates potential conflict when same item is edited in both systems simultaneously; automated workflow editing roadmap items that are Jira-synced must coordinate edit locking; automated edits without conflict awareness may create data loss when Jira sync overwrites local changes.

auth.notes: Roadmunk uses API key for authentication. REST API with JSON. Toronto, Canada HQ. Founded 2012 by Latif Nanji. Acquired by Tempo Software in 2021. Products: Visual roadmaps, timeline views, swimlanes, Jira sync, stakeholder sharing, snapshot versioning. Integrations: Jira, GitHub, Trello, Confluence. GDPR. Serves product managers at 5,000+ companies. Competes with Aha!, Productboard, and Craft.io for product roadmaps.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Starter free (1 roadmap, 5 items); limited features
pricing.notes: Toronto CA. Tempo subsidiary. Free tier (1 roadmap). Per-user subscription. API requires Business plan.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; roadmap and item queries throttled; no webhooks — polling for changes

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — POLLING REQUIRED FOR ROADMAP CHANGES: Roadmunk does not provide webhooks; automated change detection requires polling roadmap API; automated downstream notification of roadmap changes requires implementing polling cadence appropriate for stakeholder update frequency

ROADMAP vs SNAPSHOT vs VIEW DISTINCTION: Roadmunk has Roadmaps (live), Snapshots (point-in-time copies), and Views (filtered presentations of roadmap); automated roadmap reporting must use correct object type; automated stakeholder sharing should use shareable view links rather than full roadmap access

JIRA SYNC ITEM vs NATIVE ROADMUNK ITEM: Roadmunk items can be Jira-synced (sourced from Jira) or native (created in Roadmunk); automated item creation for Jira-tracked work should use Jira sync rather than native creation; automated native item creation for Jira-tracked features creates duplicate tracking in both systems

DATE RANGE REQUIRED FOR TIMELINE ITEMS: Roadmunk timeline view items require start and end dates; automated roadmap item creation without dates creates items that appear in list view but not timeline view; automated roadmap visualization requires date population for all items

TEMPO ACQUISITION ROADMAP UNCERTAINTY: Roadmunk's API roadmap under Tempo ownership is uncertain; automated integrations should implement abstraction layer over Roadmunk API to facilitate migration to Tempo Roadmaps API if consolidation occurs
agent_readiness.security_notes: Product roadmap. GDPR. API key. US. Roadmap and product planning data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Product roadmap. GDPR. API key. US. Roadmap data.
